SEARCH
Package com.unimib.assignment3.POJO

Class Team

java.lang.Object
com.unimib.assignment3.POJO.Team
@Entity(name="team") public class Team extends Object
Team entity class.

Represents a team with a unique identifier, a list of employees, a supervisor, and a list of tasks.

  • Constructor Details

    • Team

      protected Team()
      Default constructor.

    • Team

      public Team(Supervisor supervisor)
      Constructor with supervisor. Use Supervisor.addTeamsSupervisionato to manage the relationship bidirectionally.
      Parameters:
      supervisor - the supervisor of the team

    • Team

      public Team(List<Employee> employees, Supervisor supervisor)
      Constructor with employees and supervisor.
      Parameters:
      employees - the employees of the team
      supervisor - the supervisor of the team

    • Team

      public Team(List<Employee> employees, Supervisor supervisor, List<Task> tasks)
      Constructor with employees, supervisor and tasks.
      Parameters:
      employees - the employees of the team
      supervisor - the supervisor of the team
      tasks - the tasks assigned to the team

  • Method Details

    • getTeamId

      public Long getTeamId()
      Getter for team ID.
      Returns:
      the team ID

    • getEmployees

      public List<Employee> getEmployees()
      Getter for employees.
      Returns:
      the list of employees

    • addEmployee

      public void addEmployee(Employee employee)
      Adds an employee to the team. If the employee is already in the team, it is not added again. Use setEmployee to add one employee and manage the relationship bidirectionally.
      Parameters:
      employee - the employee to add

    • removeAllEmployees

      public void removeAllEmployees()
      Removes all employees from the team. Removes the relationship bidirectionally between employees and teams and clears the list.

    • removeEmployee

      public void removeEmployee(Employee employee)
      Removes an employee from the team. Removes the relationship bidirectionally between employee and team.
      Parameters:
      employee - the employee to remove

    • getSupervisor

      public Supervisor getSupervisor()
      Getter for supervisor.
      Returns:
      the supervisor

    • setSupervisor

      public void setSupervisor(Supervisor supervisor)
      Sets the supervisor of the team. Does not manage the relationship bidirectionally between supervisor and teams. It is used by the Supervisor class to manage the relationship bidirectionally.
      Parameters:
      supervisor - the supervisor to set

    • getTasks

      public List<Task> getTasks()
      Getter for tasks.
      Returns:
      the list of tasks

    • addTask

      public void addTask(Task task)
      Adds a task to the team. If the task is already in the team, it is not added again. Use setTask to add one task and manage the relationship bidirectionally.
      Parameters:
      task - the task to add

    • removeAllTasks

      public void removeAllTasks()
      Removes all tasks from the team. Removes the relationship bidirectionally between tasks and teams and clears the list.

    • removeTask

      public void removeTask(Task task)
      Removes a task from the team. Removes the relationship bidirectionally between task and team.
      Parameters:
      task - the task to remove

    • toString

      public String toString()
      toString method.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string representation of the team
